questionText: Select the form(s) in which you are reporting your agricultural/forestry emissions.
questionKo: 선택) 귀사 보고 귀사의 농업/산림 배출량.
sectorTags: Agricultural commodities, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry
simpleHelp: This question provides you the option to breakdown CO2e emissions associated with agricultural/forestry activities in your land in further categories, as advised by the GHG Protocol.
baseOptions: Emissions disaggregated by category (advised by the GHG Protocol)

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes" or "Partially" in response to 7.18, and select "Own land only" or "Value chain (including own land)" in response to the "Production" row in 1.11 column "Relevance of emissions and/or water-related impacts".
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text:
General
Note that the GHG Protocol Agricultural Guidance recommends that Scope 1 emissions should be disaggregated by the following categories:
Non-mechanical: Emissions from biological processes shaped by climatic and soil conditions or the burning of crop/timber residues.
Land use change: Emissions from land use change that results in a reduction in the size of carbon stocks e.g. from the conversion of native habitats into farmlands/production units.
Mechanical: Emissions from equipment or machinery operated on farms.
If you select "Emissions disaggregated by category", you will be able to report a breakdown of your agricultural/forestry emissions in the subsequent question.
If you are unable to report your agricultural/forestry emissions disaggregated by the categories listed above, you should select "Total emissions".
The GHG Protocol has developed new Land Sector and Removals Standard (LSRS) and Guidance . Due to the timeline of publication, organizations are not yet able to report emissions and removals in line with the LSRS in CDP's 2026 corporate questionnaire. Organizations responding to this question during the 2026 disclosure cycle should report in accordance with other GHG Protocol corporate standards.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Any option selected - 1.5 points
A maximum of 1.5/1.5 point is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 하나 이상 선택지 선택됨 - 1.5 점 이 문항에서 최대 1.5/1.5점을 받을 수 있습니다.

simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '선택) 귀사 보고 귀사의 농업/산림 배출량.'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
